function.name: CranialImplantPlanning
function.description: Guided interactive workflow for CranialImplantPlanning. Execute steps in order. Interactive steps require user 3D interaction. Steps: 'cb_step_1': In the "Segmentation Editor" module, create new segmentation as "Cranial_Segmentation".; 'cb_step_2': In the "Sourve Volume" selection section of "Segmentation Editor" module, choose the volume for segmentation.; 'cb_step_3': In the "Segmentation Editor" module, Click the "Add" botton to add a new segment as "Cranial_Segment".; 'cb_step_4': In the "Segmentation Editor" module, Click the "Threshold" botton.; 'cb_step_5': In the "Segmentation Editor" module, set the Threshold Range including the lowest value and the largest value.; 'cb_step_6': In the "Segmentation Editor" module, Click the "Apply" botton.; 'cb_step_7': In the "Skull Mask" section, choose the segment node.; 'cb_step_8': Click "Load Skull Mask" button.; 'cb_step_9': Click "Add ROI" button.; 'cb_step_10': Manually adjust the boundary of the ROI to keep the skull part. (interactive: generic)

user_action.description: Action: 'start' to begin a step, 'proceed' after user completes interaction, 'skip' for optional steps, 'cancel' to abort workflow, 'choice_made' for user_choice steps

choice_value.description: Value selected by the user for user_choice steps. Required when user_action is 'choice_made'.
